change_description: Added missing RenderPass before TAARenderPass in EffectComposer setup. The TAARenderPass requires a RenderPass to render the scene first before applying temporal anti-aliasing.

changes.change: Added RenderPass import and aliases for postprocessing classes
Added RenderPass instantiation before TAARenderPass in composer setup

root_cause: Missing RenderPass caused TAARenderPass to receive no rendered scene content, resulting in only wireframe line geometry being visible instead of the expected 3D scene with FPS counter
fix_pattern: Postprocessing pipelines require RenderPass before any effect passes - this is the standard pattern seen in all working examples (FXAA, SMAA, Bloom, etc.)
notes: Screenshot captured after fix. Kimi comparison needs to be run with KIMI_API_KEY to verify improvement score.
